plugins.name: mol
plugins.description: Project workflow skills for molcrafts repos, organized around the plannerâ†’generatorâ†’evaluator harness pattern. 17 skills + 16 single-axis agents (producer-write / producer-return / reviewer kinds per docs/agent-design.md). /mol:review is the unified static reviewer â€” takes --axis=<name> (arch/perf/docs/ux/api/science/numerics/visual/security/hygiene); /mol:simplify is the write-mode applier for janitor hygiene findings. Heavy drafting delegated to subagents (spec-writer for /mol:spec; debugger for /mol:debug + /mol:fix Step 2) to keep parent context small. Git chain /mol:pr â†’ /mol:push â†’ /mol:commit â†’ /mol:ship; follows GitHub fork convention (origin = fork, upstream = canonical) with no config â€” /mol:tag pushes release tags only to upstream. Adapts per project via mol_project frontmatter. Pair with mol-agent (harness lifecycle).

plugins.name: mol-agent
plugins.description: Per-project agent-harness lifecycle. /mol-agent:bootstrap installs CLAUDE.md + .agent/ + .claude/specs/ on first run. /mol-agent:update is the idempotent re-bootstrap (template refresh, frontmatter rescan, layout migration). /mol-agent:check audits presence + design-principles compliance.

plugins.name: mol-plugin
plugins.description: Maintenance toolkit for the molcrafts marketplace itself. /mol-plugin:new-skill scaffolds new skills, /mol-plugin:check is the marketplace's structural self-audit (parallel to /mol-agent:check for project harnesses), /mol-plugin:release bumps all plugins to a single shared version and creates a local v<X.Y.Z> commit + tag (gated through /mol:ship commit; push the tag with /mol:tag).
